'''Pormfil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kerestian/Legends|Kerestian]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] on board the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
